data.name: VOCALOIDPatcher_TranslateHardcodedStringsRestart
data.value: Restart the editor to apply changes.

data.name: MsgBox_Wave_OldEditor_Error
data.value: This Voice Bank version is not supported. Please update the Editor.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_General_ReturntoStartARA_Caption
data.value: Return to start position on stop

data.name: MsgBox_Wave_VoiceChange_Error
data.value: Failed to perform voice change. Error

data.name: MsgBox_Style_DeleteInfo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0}? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: NotFoundAudioFilesDlg_Msg
data.value: The following audio files cannot be found.

data.name: MsgBox_SequenceOptimization
data.value: The project data is optimized for the current version of VOCALOID Editor.

data.name: MsgBox_StylePresetChange_Confirm
data.value: Some of the selected parts have an edited style or a non-default style applied. Would you like to change the style to match the voice change?

data.name: MsgBox_Set_LoopRange_Error
data.value: Failed to set repeat playback section.

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_SaveEditPresetFile
data.value: Save your changes in the current preset?

data.name: MsgBox_DialogsOpened_Info
data.value: Please close all open VOCALOID windows before opening sequence file.

data.name: MainMenu_Transport_SetEndMarkerToSongPosition_Header
data.value: Set End Marker to Song Position

data.name: MsgBox_ExpiredLeaseFile_Warning
data.value:
Error activating with Splice
Please ensure the Splice app is open and try again. VOCALOID6 will start in the Lite version.

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_MessageCreatePresetFilePath
data.value: Failed to create preset file path.

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_ChageedImportPresetFile
data.value: Set the current preset to the imported one?

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_PresetFileOverWrite
data.value: A file with this name already exists. Overwrite existing file?

data.name: MsgBox_AudioMixdown_FailedMixdownMulti
data.value: Failed to perform multi track audio mixdown.

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_MessageResetShortcutKey
data.value: Reset the shortcuts for this command to its default setting?

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_MessageClosingError
data.value: An error occurred while closing the dialog. Discard changes and exit dialog.

data.name: StyleSaveAsDlg_SystemStyleCannotOverwrite
data.value: A style preset with this name already exists. It cannot be overwritten.

data.name: DataUseDlg_Message
data.value: In order to improve the quality of this software/service, this software sends data that does not identify individuals to third parties. Yamaha and concerned third-parties collect and store data related to the use of this software, including customer access conditions, devices, OS versions and numbers of users. Do you permit transmission of software use conditions?

data.name: MsgBox_PrmChanged_PageMove
data.value: Save the changes? If not, the changes are lost.

data.name: MsgBox_Open_Sequence_UnsupportedVersion
data.value: Failed to open the file. This version of the file is not supported.

data.name: AddPartToMediaDlg_CannotSave
data.value: A media file with this name already exists. It cannot be overwritten.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_Advanced_ARAClientEnabled_Caption
data.value: Allow connection with VOCALOID Bridge plugin (requires reloading the VOCALOID Editor plugin)

data.name: MsgBox_TooManyCharacters_Warning
data.value: Too many characters have been entered, and they have been truncated to {0} characters.

data.name: MsgBox_Open_Sequence_LiteLimitedTrackDeletion
data.value: Tracks that exceeded the track limit have been deleted.

data.name: MsgBox_RobotVoice_RobotVoicesNull
data.value: Robot Voice could not be found.

data.name: MsgBox_Load_WavFile_Error
data.value: The Wav file could not be loaded.

data.name: MsgBox_Wave_TimeStretch_Error
data.value: Failed to perform time stretch. Error

data.name: MsgBox_SingingSkill_DefaultSingingSkillNull
data.value: Default Singing Skill could not be found.

data.name: ContextMenu_StartMarker_Move_Header
data.value: Set Start Marker to Song Position(_S)

data.name: FileDlg_Openable_Filter
data.value: VOCALOID5/6 Project|*.vpr|VOCALOID3/4 Sequence|*.vsqx|Piapro Studio Song|*.ppsf|All Files|*.vpr;*.vsqx;*.ppsf|All Files|*.*

data.name: VerifyLicense_NoVoice
data.value:
No voice has been installed.
The VOCALOID6 Editor requires at least one installed voice to launch.
Please install one separately.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_SettingsChangedMsg
data.value: Relaunch VOCALOID Editor to apply changes.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_Advanced_SendDataEnabled_Caption
data.value: Permit transmission of software use conditions

data.name: MsgBox_Save_TooLargeSequence_Error
data.value: Failed to save file. VOCALOID project size exceeds 2GB.

data.name: MsgBox_ExpiredLeaseFile_Error
data.value:
Error activating with Splice
Please ensure the Splice app is open and try again.

data.name: MsgBox_DoubleStart_Error
data.value: VOCALOID6 Editor cannot launch because the VOCALOID6 Standalone Version, VSTi Version, or AU Version is already running.

data.name: MsgBox_AudioMixdown_TheFileNameContainsInvalidCharacters
data.value: The file name contains invalid characters.

data.name: VerifyLicense_EditorTrial
data.value:
VOCALOID6 Editor not authorized.
Please enter a valid VOCALOID6 serial code into the VOCALOID Authorizer.
Authorize now?
(Clicking [Authorize now] will launch the VOCALOID Authorizer.)

data.name: MsgBox_Open_Sequence_BackupFileHasBeenFound
data.value: A backup file was found. Do you want to restore from it?

data.name: MsgBox_Open_Sequence_InvalidDataException_Error
data.value: An archive entry was not found or was corrupt.

data.name: MsgBox_Discard_Confirmation
data.value: The edited data will be discarded. This action cannot be undone. Do you wish to continue?

data.name: MainMenu_View_ToggleControlParameterArea_Header
data.value: Show or Hide Control Parameters Area

data.name: NormalizeNote_Label
data.value: Overlapping notes are truncated to the length of the next note.

data.name: VerifyLicense_LiteEditor1
data.value: Lite version does not support VST/AU functionality.

data.name: CheckUpdate_CheckBox_DontCheckOnStartup
data.value: Don't check for updates upon launch.

data.name: MainMenu_Transport_SetStartMarkerToSongPosition_Header
data.value: Set Start Marker to Song Position

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_MessageConfirmationButtonError
data.value: Failed to save changes. Discard changes and exit dialog.

data.name: MsgBox_UserConfiguration_FailedToInit_Error
data.value: Failed to initialize user configuration file. VOCALOID Editor will now close.

data.name: SplitNote_ShortNoteAlert_Label
data.value: There are short notes that cannot be split.

data.name: AudioMixdownDlg_OverwriteInfo
data.value: A file with this name already exists. Overwrite existing file?

data.name: CustomizeShortcutDlg_MessagePathSystemShortcutKeysNotFoundError
data.value: System shortcut path does not exist.

data.name: ContextMenu_EndMarker_Move_Header
data.value: Set End Marker to Song Position(_E)

data.name: VoiceChangedDlg_Msg1
data.value: The voice banks that are not installed are used in the project.

data.name: VoiceChangedDlg_Msg2
data.value: They will be replaced with the installed ones.

data.name: VerifyLicense_VoiceNotAuthorizedOrExpiredLeaseFile
data.value: The following voice has not been authorized, or the lease has expired.

data.name: MsgBox_FailedToOpenRenderingFile
data.value:
Fatal Error: Failed to write synthesized audio file.
Please save your project under a different name and then relaunch the application.

data.name: CheckUpdate_UpToDate
data.value: Your software is up to date.

data.name: MsgBox_ImportFile_Load_Error_DueToUnsupportedVersion
data.value: Failed to import the file. This version of the file is not supported.

data.name: MsgBox_Media_DeleteInfo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0}? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: VerifyLicense_EnterSerialNumberOrStartSplice
data.value:
Please enter the applicable serial code for this voice into the VOCALOID Authorizer, or start splice and connect to the internet. (Voicebanks whose authorization grace periods have expired, or whose leases have expired, will not play.)
Authorize now?
(Clicking [Yes] will launch the VOCALOID Authorizer.)

data.name: MsgBox_UserConfiguration_Corrupted_Error
data.value: The user configuration file will be initialized because it is corrupted.

data.name: MsgBox_HowToImportAudio
data.value: Insert audio on one track or insert each on different track?

data.name: VerifyLicense_EditorNotAuthorized
data.value:
VOCALOID6 Editor not authorized.
Please enter a valid VOCALOID6 serial code into the VOCALOID Authorizer.

data.name: MsgBox_Wave_OldVoiceBank_Error
data.value: This Voice Bank version is not supported. Please update the Voice Bank.

data.name: MsgBox_SequenceOptimization_Error
data.value: Failed to optimize project data for the current version of VOCALOID Editor.

data.name: MsgBox_TooLongName_Warning
data.value: Too long names are not loaded.

data.name: VerifyLicense_VoiceNotAuthorized
data.value: The following voice has not been authorized.

data.name: VoiceChangedDlg_Title
data.value: Voice banks have not been installed

data.name: CheckUpdate_Description1
data.value: A new version of VOCALOID Editor is available to download.

data.name: MsgBox_ClearCache
data.value: The cache clearing process is performed when closing the current project.

data.name: MsgBox_AudioMixdown_FailedMixdownPart
data.value: Failed to perform partial audio mixdown.

data.name: ExtractLyrics_Announce
data.value: The lyrics have been copied to the clipboard.

data.name: AudioMixdownDlg_OpenExplorer
data.value: Open folder after export to audio file

data.name: ContextMenu_New_Header
data.value: Create Time Signature on Song Position(_N)

data.name: ReplaceUnavailableVoiceDlg_Msg1
data.value: The voice banks that cannot be used are set in the parts of the project.

data.name: ReplaceUnavailableVoiceDlg_Msg2
data.value: They will be replaced with available voice banks.

data.name: DownloadContent_Description
data.value: Additional VOCALOID content is available to download.

data.name: MsgBox_AudioMixdown_ThePathNameIsTooLong
data.value: The path name is too long.

data.name: MsgBox_Revert_Confirm
data.value: Revert to the previously saved version?

data.name: VerifyLicense_EnterSerialNumber
data.value:
Please enter the applicable serial code for this voice into the VOCALOID Authorizer. (Voicebanks whose authorization grace periods have expired will not play.)
Authorize now?
(Clicking [Yes] will launch the VOCALOID Authorizer.)

data.name: MsgBox_AudioMixdown_FailedToExportAudioFileThisPlace
data.value: Failed to export Audio File this place. : Error

data.name: MsgBox_Wave_Reverse_Error
data.value: Failed to reverse audio wave. Error

data.name: MsgBox_VoiceBank_Update_Result
data.value: The following Voice Banks that can be updated.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_General_StylePresetChangeMode_Confirm
data.value: Replace if Default Style, Ask Otherwise

data.name: MsgBox_Save_Style_Error
data.value: Failed to save style preset file.

data.name: MsgBox_ResetVoiceForVoiceChanger
data.value: The voice banks that cannot be used for VOCALO CHANGER target are set in the audio parts of the project. The targets of these parts will be reset.

data.name: MsgBox_PaidOffLeaseFile
data.value:
Lease Paid
Congratulations! Your Splice lease has been paid off. Please enter your license key to activate the application.

data.name: PreferencesDlg_General_ReturntoStart_Caption
data.value: Return to start position on stop

data.name: MsgBox_VoiceBank_Update_Prompt
data.value: Please check the websites of Voice Bank vendors.

data.name: MsgBox_TrackCouldNotBeAdded
data.value: Tracks could not be added because the maximum number of tracks was exceeded.
